scripts.dev: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../../scripts/sync-desktop-ui.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../../scripts/ensure-sidecar-binary.ps1 && tauri dev
scripts.prebuild: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../../scripts/stop-desktop-processes.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../../scripts/ensure-sidecar-binary.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../../scripts/sync-desktop-ui.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../../scripts/prepare-desktop-icons.ps1
